name: Hollandaise Sauce- Microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter, 2 tablespoons lemon juice, and salt in a medium microwave-safe bowl.
2. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and microwave on high until the butter melts, about 1 minute.
3. Whisk to cool slightly.
4. Whisk in egg yolks until blended.
5. Microwave covered for 30 seconds, then whisk again until blended.
6. Repeat step 5 twice.
7. Whisk in remaining lemon juice and Tabasco sauce.
8. Serve warm, garnished with lemon zest.
Makes 3/4 cup. 362 calories per 1/4 cup.
